domain: Mapuche ülkantun oral chants (Mapudungun Chile/Argentina Patagonia; multi-category song corpus encoding occupation memory + lineage + healing; epic/healing/love/lullaby/elegy categories with distinct decay rates in collective memory)
specific_mechanism: Category-conditioned multi-rate context-decay attention attenuator: each context segment s_t at position p_t is tagged with a category c_t ∈ {EPIC, HEAL, LOVE, ELEGY, LULLABY}; each category has its own decay rate δ_c (epic = 0.01 slow, lullaby = 0.5 fast); attention weight to s_t at relative offset τ is scaled by exp(-δ_{c_t}·τ). Standard attention logits remain unchanged; only the post-softmax weight or pre-softmax bias is scaled by the category-conditioned exponential.
llm_application: ULKANTUN-DAMP: a category-conditioned multi-rate context-decay attention attenuator. (1) Segment-level category classifier C(s_t) → c_t ∈ {EPIC, HEAL, LOVE, ELEGY, LULLABY} (or pre-tagged in context); (2) per-category decay rate δ_c (calibrated: epic=0.01, heal=0.03, love=0.05, elegy=0.08, lullaby=0.5); (3) attention modification: logit(query→s_t) += -δ_{c_t}·τ where τ = position_now - p_t; (4) softmax over biased logits. Differs from ACT-R LLM Memory (uniform decay rate, not category-conditioned), Memory Curse 2605.08060 (problem analysis, no remediation), Proactive Interference (interference characterization not decay mechanism), Context-as-RAM (engineering pattern, not attention bias). Differs from R417 VEPS-DECRESCENDO (cross-paraphrase-cycle confidence decay, not per-segment category-conditioned), R376 QAJAQ-DAMPER (feedback damping, not category-rate-multi).
novelty_claim: Distance-decay attention + ACT-R memory decay + proactive interference + context-as-RAM cover memory-decay design. ULKANTUN-DAMP adds CATEGORY-CONDITIONED multi-rate δ_c. Recombination — segment-category tagging + per-category decay rate are well-established.
